info.name: Checkiday - National Holiday and Event API

params.name: date
params.description: Date to get the events for. Defaults to today. Accepts dates such as `5/5/2025` or ISO `YYYY-MM-DD`.

params.name: adult
params.description: Include events that may be unsafe for viewing at work or by children. Defaults to false.

params.name: timezone
params.description: IANA Time Zone for calculating dates and times. Defaults to `America/Chicago`.

items.docs:
Get all events for a specified date. Returns the date's events, any
multi-day events that start on that date, and any multi-day events
that are continuing their observance on that date.

params.name: id
params.description: The ID of the requested Event.

params.name: start
params.description: The starting range of returned occurrences. Defaults to 2 years prior.

params.name: end
params.description: The ending range of returned occurrences. Defaults to 3 years in the future.

items.docs:
Get additional information for a specific Event, including alternate
names, hashtags, images, sources, founders, description, how to
observe, observance patterns, and historical and future occurrences.

params.name: query
params.description: The search query. Must be at least 3 characters long.

params.name: adult
params.description: Include events that may be unsafe for viewing at work or by children. Defaults to false.

items.docs:
Search for events matching a query string. Query must be at least 3
characters long. Returns a list of matching Event summaries.
